creator: software@bertram-scharpf.de
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #1)

> The proper solution is to add a build dependency on docbook-xsl like this:
> BUILD_DEPENDS=    docbook-xsl>=0:textproc/docbook-xsl

Sorry, but this won't help. The files

  devel/gvfs/Makefile
  security/libsecret/Makefile

already contain this line and the build crashes regardless of that.
